about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a passionate full-stack developer with extensive front-end and back-end experience, dedicated to creating high-quality digital products and solving real-world problems. I combine technology and design to create better experiences for users.
about.devDesc: Building high-performance web applications with modern technologies
about.designDesc: Creating intuitive and beautiful user interfaces and experiences
about.innovateDesc: Continuously exploring new technologies and creative solutions
